name: advance-codex
description: Creator plugin for advanced Codex capability design across skills, plugins, and subagent systems.

interface.shortDescription: Design stronger skills, plugins, and Codex subagent systems.
interface.longDescription: Provides creator skills for authoring reusable Codex capabilities: shaping skills, packaging plugins, and designing reliable subagent workflows and custom agents.
defaultPrompt: Use $advance-codex-guide to decide whether this should become a skill, plugin, or subagent workflow.
Use $plugin-creator to package a plugin and define the right bundled surfaces.
Use $skill-creator to design a reusable Codex skill with the right references and guardrails.
Use $subagent-creator to design a Codex subagent workflow, custom agent spec, and runtime control plan.
